allow:
Bash(/tmp/test_attempt.plain << 'EOF'
task Main\(\)
    display\("before"\)
    attempt
        display\("  in attempt"\)
    handle error
        display\("  in handle"\)
    display\("after"\)
EOF)

Bash(/tmp/test_attempt2.plain << 'EOF'
task Divide using \(a, b\)
    if b == 0
        abort "Cannot divide by zero"
    deliver a / b

task Main\(\)
    display\("before attempt"\)
    attempt
        display\("  trying..."\)
    handle error
        display\("  caught: " & error\)
    display\("after attempt"\)
    display\("done"\)
EOF)

Bash(/tmp/test_attempt3.plain << 'EOF'
task Main\(\)
    display\("=== Test 1 ==="\)
    attempt
        display\("  trying..."\)
    handle error
        display\("  caught: " & error\)
    rem: spacer
    display\("after attempt 1"\)

    display\("=== Test 2 ==="\)
    attempt
        abort "oops"
    handle error
        display\("  caught: " & error\)
    rem: spacer
    display\("after attempt 2"\)

    display\("all done!"\)
EOF)

Bash(/tmp/test_handle.plain << 'EOF'
task Main\(\)
    attempt
        abort "something bad"
    handle
        display\("caught an error!"\)
    var x = 0
    display\("done: " & x\)
EOF)

Bash(/tmp/test_handle2.plain << 'EOF'
task Main\(\)
    attempt
        abort "something bad"
    handle
        display\("caught an error!"\)
    display\("after"\)
    display\("done"\)
EOF)

Bash(/tmp/test_handle3.plain << 'EOF'
task Main\(\)
    attempt
        abort "something bad"
    handle err
        display\("caught: " & err\)
    display\("after"\)
    display\("done"\)
EOF)
